name: Meta Ads for Politicians
description: Facebook and Instagram advertising platform — the most widely used paid social platform for political campaigns in Australia. Offers granular targeting, event promotion, and fundraising integrations.
whyUseIt: Facebook reaches more Australian voters than any other platform. Meta Ads let campaigns target by location, age, interests, and behaviour — and the platform's event and fundraising tools integrate directly with campaign operations.
aiCapabilities: Advantage+ automated campaigns, AI audience expansion, dynamic creative optimisation
funnelPosition: Full funnel — awareness, engagement, and conversion
marketerWorkflow: Create authorised political advertiser account, build electorate-targeted audiences, run video content for awareness, retarget engaged viewers with donation or volunteer asks
managerExpects: Weekly metrics: reach, engagement, cost per result, volunteer sign-ups, donations attributed to ads

vocabulary.definition: Meta requires political advertisers to verify identity and include 'Paid for by' disclaimers on all political ads
An audience Meta builds that resembles your existing supporters — useful for finding new potential voters

beginnerMistakes: Running political ads without completing the authorisation process — ads will be rejected
Relying too heavily on paid social without building organic community engagement
